_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in performing data fusion from all-source intelligence for network analysis and reconstruction (e.g., Single Table Inheritance (STIs), network maps).
reference_document_element_description: Skill in facilitating data and AI communities of practice, including knowledge sharing forums, best practice documentation, cross-team collaboration initiatives, and capability building activities.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-S-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-S-001 (DA, cosine: 0.442), LS-S-009 (LS, cosine: 0.431).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.484). Shared vocabulary: [data, skill]. DCWF-only terms [analysis, fusion, inheritance, intelligence, maps, network] vs WIDAI-only terms [activities, ai, best, building, capability, collaboration] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.845 (P=0.837, R=0.852). Balanced P/R — the 20-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.0%, N:76.1%, C:23.9%). No dominant classification for "Skill in performing data fusion from all-source intelligence for network analysi" vs "Skill in facilitating data and AI communities of practice, including knowledge s" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.486 ≈ STS 0.484 (gap 0.002). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.3%. Shared tokens: [data, skill]. DCWF-only: [analysis, fusion, inheritance, intelligence, maps, network]. WIDAI-only: [activities, ai, best, building, capability, collaboration].
